alerts.title: July 4th holiday slide: Friday pickups move to Saturday
alerts.detail: Trash, recycling, and food waste collection is on a slide schedule for Independence Day. Households normally collected on Friday, July 3rd will be serviced on Saturday, July 4th.

alerts.title: Fort Totten Transfer Station closed Friday, July 3rd
alerts.detail: The Fort Totten Transfer Station is closed Friday, July 3rd and reopens Saturday, July 4th.
